title: push()
subtitle: Add to the end of an array
goal: Learn to add new elements to the end of an array using push().
explanation: push() adds a new element to the end of an array.
You can add strings, numbers, and other values.
The array changes after push() is called.
The new element becomes the last item in the list.
push() is one of the most popular array methods.

analogy.title: Analogy
analogy.text: Imagine a line of people. push() adds a new person at the very end of the line.

remember: push() adds an element to the end of an array.
The new element becomes the last one.

mistake.title: Common mistake
mistake.text: Beginners sometimes expect push() to add an element at the beginning. In fact, it always adds the element at the end.

quiz.question: What is the result of fruits.push("Orange") for ["Apple", "Banana"]?
